title: Kill All Mobs
description: Datapack that gives you advancements for killing every unique mob in Minecraft. Made for the "ekvyn" YouTube channel by ekvyn and Powercyphe
body:
**Kill All Mobs adds categorised advancements for killing every single unique mob in the game and contains counters that easily help you keep track of your progress.**
In total the datapack containes 4949 advancements for specific mobs. Counters are included for mobs who posses multiple variants or are hard to keep track of (ex. Villagers) and global trackers (ex. All Mobs (fishless))

Made for the needs of the [ekvyn](https://www.youtube.com/@ekvyn) YouTube channel for [this video](https://youtu.be/42ZVusEqNww)
![A in-game screenshot of the "Progress Tracker" showcasing having gotten all 4949 unique mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06354be9f86df6e82de657d76b2a5e0e6ab43a4a.png)
This datapack was not tested for running advancements of Tropical Fish and all other mobs at the same time, in the video these were split into seperate datapacks, here they are combined for simplicity. This might cause bugs such as reciving and advancements for killing a Tropical Fish when for example killing a horse.

Mods simmilar to [Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/paginatedadvancements) (Fabric) or [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) (Forge) are recommended in order to enlarge the size of the advancement GUI.
